name: Handyman
title: AI Tools for Handyman Businesses | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for handyman businesses — answer every inquiry, quote small jobs fast, and keep your schedule full. Built in two weeks from $1,500.
hero_lede: A handyman business lives on volume — lots of small jobs, lots of inquiries, lots of scheduling. We build the tools that handle the back-and-forth so you stay on the tools, not the phone.
drains: A constant stream of small-job inquiries to answer and quote
Scheduling Tetris across dozens of short jobs
Quotes that go unanswered with no follow-up
The owner choosing between doing the work and booking the work

tools.title: Inquiry assistant
tools.body: Every call, text, and form gets an instant reply, the job scoped with the right questions, and a slot booked — so you stop losing small jobs to slow response.

tools.title: Quick-quote drafter
tools.body: It drafts ballpark quotes for common jobs from your standard rates, so a customer gets a number fast instead of waiting for you to get off a ladder.

tools.title: Quote follow-up assistant
tools.body: Open quotes get a friendly nudge if the customer goes quiet, so the small jobs that add up don't quietly disappear.

tools.title: Daily schedule brief
tools.body: One morning text: today's stops in route order, materials to grab, and what's still open to fill.

cases.context: A solo handyman turning away work he couldn't schedule.
cases.before: Inquiries piled up while he was on jobs; many callers booked someone else.
cases.after: An assistant answers, scopes, and books every inquiry while he works.
cases.impact: Representative result: a consistently full schedule without the owner touching the phone mid-job.

cases.context: A small handyman crew with no quote follow-up.
cases.before: Quotes went out and were forgotten if the customer didn't reply right away.
cases.after: Every open quote followed up automatically until the customer decides.
cases.impact: Representative result: more small jobs closed from the same lead volume.

faq.q: Can it quote small jobs without me?
faq.a: For common, well-defined jobs, yes — it gives a ballpark from your standard rates. Anything unusual gets flagged for you to price personally.

faq.q: I'm a one-person business. Is this overkill?
faq.a: It's the opposite. When you're the whole company, the phone is your biggest bottleneck. Handing the booking back-and-forth to a tool is what lets a solo operator actually grow.

faq.q: Will it work with my scheduling app?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of Jobber, Housecall Pro, or whatever you already use — or set up something simple if you're running on a notebook.
